positive: An intricately detailed graphic design of a bioluminescent forest scene. The central subject is a stylized, symmetrical grouping of glowing mushrooms, ferns, and mystical vines, rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and vibrant neon pinks. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and vaporwave neon glow, emphasizing clean, sharp outlines and strong contrast against a dark, midnight background. Use clean silhouettes and an ethereal glow effect emanating from the flora, making the design suitable for a central, repeating apparel print. Focus on symmetrical composition and high contrast for visual pop, ensuring all elements are graphic and non-photorealistic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, out of frame, photographic, 3d render, realistic, logo, text, letters
